category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison - China export to Fiji.

title.en: China-to-Fiji EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入斐济：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入斐濟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Fiji DNTMS, FCCC, and EFL expectations, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, Fiji 240/415 V 50 Hz grid conditions, coastal cyclone and salt-mist derating, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与斐济DNTMS、FCCC和EFL预期、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、IEC 61000 EMC证据、斐济240/415 V 50 Hz电网条件、沿海气旋和盐雾降额，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與斐濟DNTMS、FCCC和EFL預期、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、IEC 61000 EMC證據、斐濟240/415 V 50 Hz電網條件、沿海氣旋和鹽霧降額，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Fiji, the practical gaps are IEC-aligned product evidence, connector conversion from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC, EFL project-level connection acceptance, EMC and power-quality evidence under IEC 61000 practice, and environmental derating for coastal salt mist, high humidity, cyclones, heat, and outdoor corrosion. Fiji uses 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase at 50 Hz. Fiji has the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline, so input-voltage range, protection settings, cable ratings, and thermal derating must be confirmed. Fiji's EV market is nascent and an EVSE-specific national certification rule could not be confirmed from official public sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current DNTMS/FCCC import route, EFL connection requirements, HS code, and project specification before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入斐济时，实务差距包括：IEC体系产品证据；接口从GB/T 20234转换为交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；EFL项目级接入验收；IEC 61000实践下的EMC和电能质量证据；以及针对沿海盐雾、高湿、气旋、高温和户外腐蚀的环境降额。斐济采用240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz。频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线，因此必须确认输入电压范围、保护设置、电缆额定值和热降额。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方公开来源确认斐济已有专门适用于EVSE整机的国家强制认证规则；出口商应在出货前核实当前DNTMS/FCCC进口路径、EFL接入要求、HS编码和项目规范。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入斐濟時，實務差距包括：IEC體系產品證據；接口從GB/T 20234轉換為交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；EFL項目級接入驗收；IEC 61000實踐下的EMC和電能質量證據；以及針對沿海鹽霧、高濕、氣旋、高溫和戶外腐蝕的環境降額。斐濟採用240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz。頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線，因此必須確認輸入電壓範圍、保護設置、電纜額定值和熱降額。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方公開來源確認斐濟已有專門適用於EVSE整機的國家強制認證規則；出口商應在出貨前核實當前DNTMS/FCCC進口路徑、EFL接入要求、HS編碼和項目規範。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DNTMS or FCCC scope determination, EFL connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Fiji conformity assessment rules, EFL project requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、DNTMS或FCCC适用范围裁定、EFL接入批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行斐济合格评定规则、EFL项目要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、DNTMS或FCCC適用範圍裁定、EFL接入批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行斐濟合格評定規則、EFL項目要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
